title: Sandbox Execution Environments
content:
# Interview Prep: Sandboxing

## Q1: How do you prevent a malicious python script executed by an agent from consuming all host CPU resources?

### Standard Answer
We configure container-level resource limits (e.g. Docker cgroups), restricting the sandbox process to a single CPU core and a fixed RAM allocation (e.g. 512MB), and enforce execution timeout bounds.
